_comment: Synthetic Cursor/VS-Code working-state scene. Monaco's buffer is inaccessible (the sentinel), so the code body is the AX ceiling — behavior comes from the reliable layer instead: the title names the unsaved active file ('● AgentLoop.swift — osaurus') and the bottom status bar carries the git branch, problems count, language, and cursor position. A top-left 'Explorer' panel label is single-token chrome that must stay dropped. Proves the 'Active:'/'Status:' behavior extraction composes a useful read of what the user is doing even when no code/message text is accessible.

elements.label: The editor is not accessible at this time. To enable screen reader optimized mode, use Shift+Option+F1
